title: Paediatric Speech and Language Therapist
description:
Job Scope:

We are searching for a fully registered AHPC Paediatric Speech and Language Therapist to join our dynamic team, providing assessment and intervention to a varied caseload of children aged 2-18.


About the Role:
Conduct comprehensive assessments using both formal and informal assessment tools
Complete formal written reports for parents and other professionals
Set functional and SMART goals for therapy and prepare a therapy plan
Complete classroom observations and work closely with teaching staff
Provide motivating therapy sessions in the home and school settings with ongoing feedback to parents
Provide guidance to parents and teachers on how to work together with the child to achieve their goals
Work in a multidisciplinary team of professionals, including occupational therapists, teachers, and psychologists


About You:
Must possess a recognised Degree in Speech Therapy or Speech Pathology
Must be fully AHPC registered
Be a highly motivated self starter able to work independently
Be willing to travel to homes and schools all over Singapore
Keep up to date with the latest evidence based best practices
Be willing to further your knowledge and qualifications through targeted CPD


About Us:
We seek to bridge the gap between children, caregivers, schools and therapists
We are a mobile practice, assessments and therapy sessions take place in homes and schools all over Singapore
We offer a flexible working environment with a Monday/Friday working week
Work alongside a diverse team of Speech and Occupational Therapists with an abundance of materials and equipment.
Help create the best evidence-based experience for clients under your care
We are passionate about continued CPD and support our therapists in accessing training
An attractive base compensation and benefits package above market rates.
Gain immense clinical experience through a varied caseload, training, and interaction with peers
Be part of a vibrant multidisciplinary team that will provide opportunities to learn and work closely together

postedCompany.description:
Thumbs Up Therapy is a mobile practice in Singapore, seeking to bridge the gap between​ children, caregivers, schools and therapists

We provide holistic, child-centered therapy services and workshops in homes and schools across Singapore, opening the lines of communication between all who are involved in the child’s wellbeing.
postedCompany.name: THUMBS UP THERAPY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
